title: Ubiquiti POE-24-30W-G-WH
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Pasive PoE / PoE injectors
description: The Ubiquiti POE-24 is a grounded PoE injector with a maximum output power of 30 W . It provides one input port for a traditional LAN connection and a second port as a PoE output port. The maximum data transfer rate is 1 Gbps . This device is not equipped with LED indicator Maximum Output Power 30 W One PoE Port Maximum Transfer Rate 1 Gbps No LED Indicator GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
